message:
agent: add turn_event_tests module for TurnStart/TurnEnd verification

New test module turn_event_tests validates the agent event lifecycle:

Test: turn_events_wrap_assistant_response
- Creates a SingleShotProvider that emits Start + Done events
- Runs agent session and captures all AgentEvent emissions
- Verifies exactly one TurnStart and one TurnEnd event
- Verifies TurnStart comes before TurnEnd in event sequence
- Verifies AssistantMessage MessageEnd occurs before TurnEnd
- Verifies TurnEnd carries the assistant message and empty tool_results

Test infrastructure:
- SingleShotProvider: minimal Provider impl returning canned response
- assistant_message helper: creates AssistantMessage with text content
- Uses RuntimeBuilder::current_thread for single-threaded test execution

Minor fix: abort_tests join error message now says "run_text_with_abort"
for better test failure diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
